model: v20clean 3-seed club ensemble + v21goal blend w=0.65 (lineup-aware)
confirmed_lineup_note: Both XIs 11/11 from ESPN summary (event 401893764) minutes before kickoff; prediction run on confirmed lineups.

bets.staking_method: Recommended EUR5 at the 2.75 threshold quote before the actual price was known; placed at 3.25 with stake unchanged (user-directed). Formula at 3.25 would give halfKelly 6.67% x EUR193.43 = EUR12.90 (under 8% cap) -> EUR13; stake stays EUR5 as recommended.

excluded_legs_note: Draw and CFR win below +3pp edge at available prices.
data_note: Match predictable only after 2026-07-23 coverage work (team alias CFR Cluj-Napoca->CFR Cluj + roster-league fallback; CFR roster from their 2023 UECL campaign, 10/22 lineup embeddings unmatched). Flagged once per policy: edge partly rides on cross-league Elo for a thin-data pairing.
provenance_note: Prediction generated pre-kickoff from confirmed XIs (session artifacts); bet placed at Unibet around kickoff; this commit logged minutes AFTER kickoff (~15:0xZ), before any result information. Not a pre-kickoff-proof pick per the strict standard.
